constraints: Assessment records are append-only. PATCH creates a new version row; the previous row must remain in the database unmodified.
Only clinical_reviewer or admin role may call POST /cases/{case_id}/assessments or set review_status=finalized.

The backward transition under_clinical_review→needs_clinical_review must always require a non-empty transition_reason string; the transition allowlist in core-infrastructure enforces role but clinical-module enforces the reason requirement.

ClinicalAssessment field names must not be renamed or aliased; they must exactly match FacilityCapabilities field names as documented in the shared model (e.g. wound_vac_needs, oxygen_required, memory_care_needed, behavioral_complexity_flag, isolation_precautions, bariatric_needs, iv_antibiotics, tpn).
All PatientCase status transitions must be delegated to core-infrastructure's shared status-transition handler; clinical-module must not mutate current_status directly.
AuditEvent must be written as an insert-only operation; no updates or deletes to AuditEvent records.
organization_id tenant isolation must be enforced on every read and write; a clinical_reviewer must not access assessments from another organization.
